message: Hello, I recently developed a very itchy penis which when I itch, leads to red patchs which sometimes become red and glossy. It is very irritable and causes pain when i have intercourse. I also have developed itchy thighs.. It started just at the top and has now developed over most of my thighs. The itching comes and goes and shows in small patches , not lumps but itchy red spots. i am worried that it is an std as i have had a lot of unprotected sex recently (lesson learnt) but the symptoms don t relate to any std so i m puzzled!? i also have what i thought was joggers nipple? very itchy nipple and also my face sometimes has dry patches on the eyelids and near the hair receding line? It has been going on for the last 3 months and as i m still in China and not a native speaker, i can t really find any treatment or diagnosis. please help?
rationale_a: The symptoms are chronic (present for 3 months) without systemic signs or rapidly worsening features, suggesting a non-emergent, non-urgent dermatologic condition.
rationale_b: Genital itching with red glossy patches and pain during intercourse plus spreading itchy thigh rash raises concern for an infectious or inflammatory genital dermatosis needing clinician evaluation within 24–72h.

message: I have been on the birth control Kelnor 1/35 for a few years now and it has work great. Just this past month, my doctor without telling me put me on Zovia 1/35. I read that these two are similar but I am now noticing my thoughts upsetting me, over thinking, and thinking my feelings have changed for someone or something when just a week ago when I first took this new pill, I was fine. This does not feel like myself and I am becoming very overwhelmed and upset. Do you think it is because of the switch?
rationale_a: The patient is experiencing mood changes after a medication switch but does not report any dermatologic or life-threatening symptoms.
rationale_b: New, distressing mood/thought changes and feeling overwhelmed after a recent birth control switch warrants prompt clinician review to assess medication side effects and safety.

message: I have a smallish red spot on the right top edge of my penis head, as well as a blotchy red area on the dorsal side of the shaft, in the top area where I was circumcised. The spots/blotches are painless, do not itchy, and might be very slightly raised, but not very noticeably so. I currently am in a committed relationship and we do not use condoms, but neither of us have ever experienced any problems or concerns regarding STDs. I assume it is some kind of friction irritation, but am concerned it is something more serious.
rationale_a: The described lesions are painless, non-itchy, and without systemic symptoms or rapid progression, suggesting a non-urgent, likely benign cause.
rationale_b: New red spots/blotchy rash on the penis (even if painless and non-itchy) warrants prompt clinician review to evaluate for infection or other causes beyond friction irritation.

message: My 8 month old has HFM, and is in a lot of pain. Blisters everywhere, barely able to sleep and is inconsolable when awake. Other than giving him Tylenol and offering cold things to chew on I m not sure what to do to keep him comfortable enough to sleep?
rationale_a: The message describes discomfort from hand, foot, and mouth disease (HFM) without mention of systemic red flags such as high fever, lethargy, or dehydration.
rationale_b: An 8‑month‑old with hand-foot-mouth disease who is inconsolable with widespread blisters and significant pain needs prompt clinician guidance to assess for dehydration or complications and optimize pain control.

message: My butt is really sore bumpy and itchy around anus and cheeks even surrounding vagina, is it bcoz I shaved it when I felt it was itchy??? I m scared! I just suffered from hair dye allergy and my armpits are sore and red too! Also couple times my bowel movement had fresh blood in it!!!!! Help!!!!!!
rationale_a: The patient reports new onset of perianal and vulvar soreness, bumps, and itching with recent shaving, plus fresh blood in stool and a history of recent allergic reaction, which requires prompt clinician review to rule out infection or other concerning causes.
rationale_b: Reports fresh blood with bowel movements along with painful/itchy rash in the perianal/genital area and widespread irritation after a recent allergy, which warrants same-day evaluation to rule out serious causes.

message: Hi I had an ubaliacil hernia operated on, on the 15th September. It started oozing puss a week later through the wound. The wound stopped oozing out of my wound and then the same day it started coming out of my bellybutton. I put up with it for 7 weeks then my specialist did an exploration and left a 2cm cut just inside my bellybutton and said that there was just a pocket of the puss and that it would dry up it s been over a week now and it hasn t stopped and is getting more green every day what should I do ?
rationale_a: Persistent and worsening green pus from a post-operative wound suggests possible infection requiring prompt clinician review, though no systemic symptoms are reported.
rationale_b: Post-operative wound with persistent and worsening green purulent drainage suggests a surgical site infection/abscess that needs same-day urgent evaluation to prevent systemic spread.

message: I have been told that I have a chest full of lympnoids some people say you dont get lympnoids in your lungs but my c- scan says otherwise i am scheduled for a biopsy sometime in the next couple weeks and I am very nervous and scared of what is happening..
rationale_a: The patient is expressing anxiety about a scheduled biopsy and lymph nodes seen on imaging, but is not reporting any acute or concerning symptoms requiring urgent or emergent attention.
rationale_b: Patient reports CT findings of lymph nodes in the chest/lungs with an upcoming biopsy and significant concern, which warrants prompt clinician review to address potential serious underlying disease and clarify next steps.

message: Hi Doctor I have been sufferring from Psoriasis on my palm, fingers and feet from last 10 yrs. I have tried several medicines but nothing helps me other than Topisal 6%. I have recently had a flare up which is bad. My figers are all scaly and itchy. I have been applying topisal 3% but its not working. Could you pls suggest what can do to get relief from the scales and itch. Thanks
rationale_a: The patient describes a chronic psoriasis flare with increased symptoms but no signs of infection, systemic illness, or acute distress.
rationale_b: Chronic palmoplantar psoriasis with a recent significant flare causing worsening scaling and itch despite current topical therapy needs clinician review for treatment adjustment within 24–72h.

message: I have a small area of sore gums inside my mouth . It s on the bottom left side, on the inside side of the jawbone where my wisdom tooth would be if I had not had it removed years ago. It hurts to push on it, feels slightly bumpy underneath the skin, and may be slightly swollen. I haven t had any injuries or anything. What could it be?
rationale_a: The patient describes a localized sore area in the mouth without systemic symptoms or rapidly worsening signs, suggesting a routine concern.
rationale_b: New localized oral pain with possible swelling and a palpable bump near a prior wisdom tooth site could indicate infection or other lesion needing prompt clinical evaluation.

message: hi, im 22 female my weight is 45, height 54 my kidney is enlarge(big) on two side of the kidney the symptoms i have is feeling likevomitting, breast pain, itching in kidney and have some disturbance in urinating and my body is restless i did not met any doctor this problem was happen last week and i dont know how it happens i was feared and tensed of this problem im very scared to see the doctor please help me doctorsuggest me the solution
rationale_a: The patient reports bilateral kidney enlargement, urinary disturbance, and systemic symptoms (restlessness, nausea), which require prompt clinician review to rule out serious renal or systemic conditions.
rationale_b: Reports bilateral enlarged kidneys with nausea/vomiting and urinary disturbance, which could indicate an acute kidney/urinary obstruction or infection requiring same-day emergency evaluation.

message: Hi. Ive been on a low dose bc pill for a few months now after switching from the IUD. All periods have been normal until this month. No period. Its several days late now, I start my active pills again today. Ive had lots of cramping for the last two weeks and nausea off and on for the last 2-3 days. Home pregnancy test was negative...? I know there were a few days I took my pill later than usual by a few hours. Not sure what to think.
rationale_a: The patient reports a missed period, mild cramping, and nausea without any acute or severe symptoms, and a negative home pregnancy test, which does not indicate urgent or emergent risk.
rationale_b: Missed/late period with two weeks of cramping and recent nausea despite a negative home pregnancy test warrants prompt clinician review to rule out pregnancy or other causes.

message: When I lay down at night my feet twitch. Just one twitch about every 30 seconds or so. Both feet. I can feel something originating in my groin area then sorta shooting down to my foot and causing a twitch. It keeps me from falling asleep quickly and is not painful, just sooo annoying. It is starting to happen during the day now.
rationale_a: The patient describes non-painful, chronic twitching without any acute or concerning symptoms such as weakness, numbness, or systemic signs.
rationale_b: New, progressively occurring bilateral leg/foot twitching with a radiating sensation from the groin now happening during the day suggests a neurologic or systemic issue needing prompt clinician review.

message: hi doc! good day! i have a little problem but iam shy to go to doctor. i have a warts , a big one in my butt. color red. i notice i just had this when i gave birth. i dont know what causes it but im wondering if theres any home remedy that i can do to remove this/ i want to cut it but im scared cause it might worsen it. what can i do? thank you.
rationale_a: The patient describes a red wart present since childbirth without acute symptoms or concerning changes, seeking advice on home remedies.
rationale_b: New, large red wart-like growth in the buttock/perianal area postpartum needs prompt clinician evaluation to confirm diagnosis (e.g., wart vs other lesion) and avoid unsafe self-removal/cutting.

message: HI I have a small, hard lump slightly of centre at the end of my sterum, If i look down while breathing out and pulling my tummy in its quite obvious, its noticeable. Its not attached to skin by seems to be on the process thing where last ribs meet.
rationale_a: The described lump is small, hard, not attached to the skin, and there are no alarming symptoms such as rapid growth, pain, redness, or systemic signs.
rationale_b: Small hard lump at the end of the sternum consistent with a stable bony prominence (xiphoid area) without skin involvement or acute red-flag symptoms described.

message: A few days ago, I noticed my ears became incredibly itchy, red and with small bumps. The skin behind the ears was also itchy and little red bumps developed. My arms and legs have also developed little bumps, either red or skin colored. They are itchy but only on my ears, arms and legs.
rationale_a: The patient describes a mild, localized, itchy rash without systemic symptoms or signs of rapid progression.
rationale_b: New, widespread itchy red bumps involving ears and extremities suggests an acute inflammatory or allergic eruption needing clinician review within 24–72 hours.

message: Foreskin tightening, pain in penis. Can I undergo sunnath operation?Hi, im 29 years old. Recently I got married whenever I m having sex im getting pain as my foreskin on the pennis is tightening. The foreskin is going back till the inner RED Area ut after that it is very tight. So now im considering Sunnath operation. May I know the avg price in & how many days it takes to completly cure. Because im doing software job and we don t have much holidays. Pls tell me the best hospital for sunnath operation in Chennai. Thank u
rationale_a: The patient describes chronic foreskin tightness and pain during intercourse without any acute or severe symptoms, and is inquiring about circumcision options and recovery time.
rationale_b: Reports painful foreskin tightening during sex consistent with possible phimosis/paraphimosis risk, needing prompt clinician evaluation (despite also asking pricing/scheduling).
